details.test: Task 1: $75 one-time donation to most efficient children meal program in Springfield
Task 2: $25 monthly recurring donation to a filtered program (emergency relief style)
Task 3: Sponsor meals using meal bundles with exact total meals from quantities
Task 4: Sign up for local food packing volunteer shift next Saturday morning
Task 5: Create personal fundraising page with $500 goal for Back-to-School Lunches
Task 6: Split $100 donation across three programs in one checkout
Task 7: Community garden story view, share, and newsletter subscription from story page
Task 8: Register for a free evening hunger awareness event next month
Task 9: Sponsor a family in Latin America with monthly sponsorship under $40
